title: PTD Flays NUPENG Over Impunity, Arrest Of NLC Chairman Rivers State Council-Alex Agwanwor - FinancialEDGE
description: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD), a critical branch of the Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG), has resumed a fierce attack on the union’s national leadership, calling for the immediate removal of key executives over what the drivers described as “reckless and irresponsible” actions that threaten Nigeria’s oil and gas sector industrial
html: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD), a critical branch of the Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG), has resumed a fierce attack on the union’s national leadership, calling for the immediate removal of key executives over what the drivers described as “reckless and irresponsible” actions that threaten Nigeria’s oil and gas sector industrial peace and harmony.
